name: Deep Fried Squid Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cleaned squid body into 1/2-inch wide rings.
2. Rinse under cold running water.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 375°F (190°C).
4. In a plastic bag, combine flour, salt, and pepper. Add a few squid rings at a time; shake until well coated.
5. In a shallow bowl, mix 2 eggs with 1 cup milk (beaten). Dip each squid ring in the liquid, then coat with about 1-1/2 cups Italian bread crumbs.
6. Fry a few at a time for about 45 seconds or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and keep warm.
7. Serve with cocktail sauce or tartar sauce.
